---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a TraceRail feature, module, rail, pack, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the outcome you want.

## Problem Solved

What workflow failure or friction does this address?

## Proposed Shape

Describe whether this should be core, a module, a rail, a pack, an adapter, or local guidance.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change has a clear contract.
- [ ] The change has a validation path.
- [ ] The change preserves traceability and memory.

## Risks

What could become confusing, heavy, unsafe, or hard to maintain?
